title: MeshRequest
description: Params in for the image2mesh layer: one image by reference plus reconstruction settings.

image.description: Reference to a PNG on the shared filesystem. Shape-compatible with text2image's ImageResult.image.

resolution.description: Geometry voxel resolution. 512 runs a single pass; 1024 and 1536 add a cascade and cost roughly twice the time and memory.

textureResolution.description: PBR volume resolution. Omit for the engine's auto choice.

atlasPx.description: UV atlas size. Omit for 2048 at res 1024, 1024 at res 512.

boxUv.description: Voxel-native box projection instead of an xatlas unwrap. Faster, worse seams.

decimateFaces.description: Target face count. 0 keeps the full mesh. Omit for 300K at res 1024, 150K at res 512.

backgroundRemoval.description: auto keeps existing alpha, else uses BiRefNet when its weights are present. threshold cuts specular highlights into holes.

maxTokens.description: High-resolution token budget. Omit for the engine default of 49152.

band.description: Narrow-band remesh width. 2 suppresses the doubled inner skin on thin-walled subjects.

runner.description: docker runs a one-shot container. server posts to an already-running t2m-server, which skips model load. binary calls a locally built t2m-cli.
